{{CargoRelic
|name=Khosrow Meets Shirin
|class_id=21848
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|source=
|description=A Persian prince rides through snow-capped mountains, rose petals falling from his silver bridle. Across a spring, an Armenian princess waits - their fateful first encounter immortalized in delicate brushstrokes.
|fame=51
|art=49
|fth=36
|civ=75
|tech=32
|ss1=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail DEF +6<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +6<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss2=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail DEF +8<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +8<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss3=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail DEF +10<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +10<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss4=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail DEF +14<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +14<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss5=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail DEF +18<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +18<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000
|ss7=Per 50k Relic Points, Snail DEF +18<br>Per 50k Relic Points, Snail RUSH +18<br>Relic Points: 1500000/1500000<br>Snail DEF +90 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:skill@1123_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4068_2
|skill2=[[File:skill@1124_1_1.png|50px]]prop@4069_2
}}
